description: Add structured support for the missing ontology standards needed to make the corpus interoperable with legal linked data, parliamentary linked data, and rules-as-code tooling.
oracle_notes: Add first-class support for ELI/ELI-DL, ECLI, EuroVoc/SKOS, CEN MetaLex, USLM, LexML, schema.org/Legislation, LKIF, LegalRuleML, Popolo, W3C ORG, DCAT/DCAT-AP, and OpenFisca/PolicyEngine ontology contracts.
